title: hesperidanthus suffrutescens
intro: Hesperidanthus suffrutescens, also known as desert marigold, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hesperidanthus suffrutescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the flowers or leaves in water or a solvent to create a medicinal solution.
